name: just-bash-harness
description: Single-agent harness on top of just-bash and the agent-skills ecosystem. Sandboxed tool execution, derived approval gates, persisted sessions, swappable LLM providers (Anthropic + Cloudflare Workers AI), cross-session memory, optional AES-256-GCM at rest.
author: Mauricio Perera

scripts.test: node --test --import=tsx src/cli-args.test.ts src/approval.test.ts src/approval-stats.test.ts src/loop.test.ts src/policy.test.ts src/policy-overrides.test.ts src/provider.test.ts src/provider-anthropic.test.ts src/provider-cloudflare.test.ts src/redact.test.ts src/rekey.test.ts src/toolbox.test.ts src/memory.test.ts src/util-encryption-error.test.ts src/skill-init.test.ts
scripts.test:list: node --test --import=tsx --test-reporter=spec src/cli-args.test.ts src/approval.test.ts src/approval-stats.test.ts src/loop.test.ts src/policy.test.ts src/policy-overrides.test.ts src/provider.test.ts src/provider-anthropic.test.ts src/provider-cloudflare.test.ts src/redact.test.ts src/rekey.test.ts src/toolbox.test.ts src/memory.test.ts src/util-encryption-error.test.ts src/skill-init.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
